title: Toggleable View Bobbing
description: Makes View Bobbing toggleable with a keybind.
body:
If you find "View Bobbing" annoying but you want to use it time to time for it's utility, this mod is for you.
The default keybind for the toggle is "G" and it's changeable in the Options.

### *** This mod will not be updated anymore and is replaced by [Haiech's Extra keybinds](https://modrinth.com/mod/haiechs-extra-keybinds) which includes this mod's functionality ***
